title: SpaceX scrubs test flight of massive Starship rocket, will retry Friday
summary_full: SpaceX's attempted Starship launch follows the company's release of its IPO prospectus, which set the stage for what's likely to be a record offering.
summary_public: SpaceX's attempted Starship launch follows the company's release of its IPO prospectus, which set the stage for what's likely to be a record offering.
